scopeReview.command: Reviewed browser comments plus CommunityPage, EventComments, feed client/service/repository, existing feed migration, and community UI tests.
scopeReview.summary: Scope covers inline feed compose slot, feed comment count synchronization, simple emoji reaction type contract, post timestamp hh:mm display, and related tests/migration. No unrelated tabs/pages/components are created.

targetedUiTests.summary: Feed service and UI regression tests passed for inline feed compose, simple emoji reactions, 24h feed timestamp, and live feed comment count synchronization.

typecheck.summary: TypeScript typecheck passed after feed reaction type contract and EventComments callback changes.

dbCheck.summary: Supabase migration contract check passed including the feed_reactions simple emoji constraint migration.

baseline.summary: Baseline verification passed. Existing lint warnings remain in CommunityPage exhaustive-deps and img usage, with no new blocking errors.

designGuard.summary: Design guard passed for the guarded UI surfaces touched by this change.

localDb.summary: Local Supabase reset, seed, and API smoke tests passed. Feed reaction API now verifies the new up reaction contract.

browserRuntime.command: localhost:3000 QA login -> Records > Board -> 게시판 작성 -> create feed -> open comments -> submit comment
browserRuntime.summary: Verified that board write opens an inline composer instead of a modal, no 피드 작성 dialog is present, a new post displays 24h timestamp such as 6월 23일 22:58, only 👍/👎/✅/🙂/😢 reactions render, and the comment button updates from 댓글 0개 to 댓글 1개 after submitting a comment. App terminal logs were unavailable in this Codex thread because no terminal session is attached.

apiIntegration.summary: Local API smoke tests passed against the reset Local Supabase stack, including feed post comment and reaction endpoint coverage.

issuesObserved: Feed compose used a modal, which interrupted the board flow.
Feed post comment count was hydrated only from list responses, so newly submitted embedded comments did not update the parent post count.
Existing feed reaction labels were domain-specific instead of the requested simple emoji set.
Local Supabase reset invalidated the previous browser session, so browser evidence used the configured local QA email login flow.
retrospective.reason: This is product-specific community feed feedback and does not justify reusable harness policy changes.
